calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Claudia J. Castillo, Esq. for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Live witness appearance was waived on Feb. 17, 2004 per written Order.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations: Mary Ann Yee, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Ocean Painting Company, Inc., and Soo Young Oh as follows:
Principal of $75,965.07
Interest $6,987.75
Attorney's fees of $990.00
Costs of $417.50
For the total of $84,360.32.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
